creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 

The plist needs some work:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%SITE_PERL%%/Dpkg/Source/Format.pm
Error: Orphaned: man/man3/Dpkg::Source::Format.3perl.gz
Error: Orphaned: @dir man/fr/man8
Error: Orphaned: @dir man/it/man8
Error: Orphaned: @dir man/sv/man8
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: man/fr/man8/start-stop-daemon.8.gz
Error: Missing: man/it/man8/start-stop-daemon.8.gz
Error: Missing: man/sv/man8/start-stop-daemon.8.gz


mfg Tobias
